name: Dataset Forge v1 Benchmark Suite (Public)
description: Benchmark cases for TextureAnalyzer and CrystallineFacetingAnalyzer. Synthetic-committed cases reference images tracked in git. Synthetic-generated cases require running scripts/generate_benchmark_defects.py first. Private real-sample cases live in benchmarks/local_benchmark_manifest.json (gitignored). See benchmarks/README.md for setup instructions.

cases.source_description: Clean reference render. Generated by scripts/generate_benchmark_defects.py from a local reference image. Probe scores: micro=22.9, grain=35.7, smooth=52.6.

expectations.notes: Clean reference. micro=22.9, well below dataset mean in synthetic group.
grain=35.7, below threshold 45. smooth=52.6, above ceiling 52 -- doubly excluded.

cases.source_description: Synthetic color noise overlay. Generated by scripts/generate_benchmark_defects.py. Probe scores: micro=23.4, grain=36.3, smooth=52.4.

expectations.notes: micro=23.4, close to reference. Low z-score in synthetic group.

cases.source_description: Synthetic combined noise+glitter+sharpening. Generated by scripts/generate_benchmark_defects.py. Probe scores: micro=32.8, grain=38.5, smooth=44.9.

expectations.notes: grain=38.5, below threshold 45. Guards: grain too low even though smooth=44.9 < ceiling 52.

cases.source_description: Semi-synthetic crosshatch fixture. Generated by scripts/generate_crystalline_fixtures.py (spacing=4, amplitude=15). Committed to git. Measured scores: grain=45.1, smooth=47.3, micro=53.0. Near-threshold positive: validates that the grain guard fires at its lower boundary.

expectations.notes: grain=45.1 (threshold 45.0), smooth=47.3 (ceiling 52.0), micro=53.0 (floor 20.0). Severity LOW: 45 <= grain=45.1 < 55.

cases.source_description: Semi-synthetic crosshatch fixture. Generated by scripts/generate_crystalline_fixtures.py (spacing=6, amplitude=30). Committed to git. Measured scores: grain=64.2, smooth=36.6, micro=65.8. Calibrated to match real anthropomorph artifact scores (reference: grain~62, smooth~37). Validates MEDIUM severity tier.

expectations.notes: grain=64.2 (threshold 45.0), smooth=36.6 (ceiling 52.0), micro=65.8 (floor 20.0). Severity MEDIUM: 55 <= grain=64.2 < 65.

cases.source_description: Flat grey (128,128,128) anchor for the texture_committed context group. Generated by scripts/generate_texture_fixtures.py. Measured scores: micro=0.0, grain=42.0, smooth=100.0. Micro is below the absolute floor (15.0), so TextureAnalyzer never fires regardless of z-score.

expectations.notes: micro=0.0 < absolute_floor=15.0. No finding regardless of z-score.

cases.source_description: Seeded uniform noise [68,189) RGB, seed=42, 256x256. Generated by scripts/generate_texture_fixtures.py. Measured scores: micro=88.7, grain=77.1, smooth=22.0. In texture_committed group [clean(0), noise(88.7)]: mean=44.35, stddev=44.35, z=1.000 -> MEDIUM. Validates TextureAnalyzer positive detection without real images.

expectations.notes: micro=88.7 >> absolute_floor=15.0. z=1.000 (structurally pinned for 2-image [0,X] group). Fires at MEDIUM.

cases.source_description: Semi-synthetic crosshatch fixture. Generated by scripts/generate_crystalline_fixtures.py (spacing=12, amplitude=30). Committed to git. Measured scores: grain=62.0, smooth=53.2, micro=43.3. Designed to have high grain but smoothness just above the ceiling -- directly validates the watercolor_smoothness < 52 guard.

expectations.notes: grain=62.0 (above threshold 45), micro=43.3 (above floor 20), BUT smooth=53.2 >= ceiling 52.0. Smoothness guard blocks detection. Validates that high grain alone is insufficient.
